message:
refactor: curate testimonials and fix carousel timing

- Curate 30 strongest testimonials with cleaner text
- Move 54 remaining testimonials to testimonials-extra.json
- Mix 80% strong + 20% extra for variety in carousel
- Slow down row animations (80s/90s vs 60s/50s)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,267 @@
+[
+  {
+    "quote": "Super powerful because of its ease of use. Literally connected to JIRA and built a skill since it wasn't on ClawdHub yet.",
+    "author": "jdrhyne",
+    "url": "https://x.com/jdrhyne/status/2008336434827002232"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Obsessed with @clawdbot",
+    "author": "danlozanov",
+    "url": "https://x.com/danlozanov/status/2009429812524536058"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "People's version of Poki",
+    "author": "mukhtharcm",
+    "url": "https://x.com/mukhtharcm/status/2008576234255774104"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "This is sick",
+    "author": "onusoz",
+    "url": "https://x.com/onusoz/status/2008189458777305499"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Handling my emails, calendar events, tasks and can API into any other tools",
+    "author": "heyitsyashu",
+    "url": "https://x.com/heyitsyashu/status/2008563498423591398"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Did not open an IDE, did not touch a terminal since last night",
+    "author": "onusoz",
+    "url": "https://x.com/onusoz/status/2008456860580397437"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "This shit is amazing!",
+    "author": "chrisrodz35",
+    "url": "https://x.com/chrisrodz35/status/2009431826117378529"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Giving my wife the gift of @clawdbot with Waitrose shopping skill this Christmas",
+    "author": "jonas",
+    "url": "https://x.com/jonas/status/2002853469733183934"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "First couple days using @clawdbot have been amazing",
+    "author": "jlehman_",
+    "url": "https://x.com/jlehman_/status/2008643709664100545"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "At this point, if you don't have @clawdbot and at least 3 long running agents, you are not hireable",
+    "author": "neoromantic",
+    "url": "https://x.com/neoromantic/status/2008800724537536965"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Using Clawdbot too much",
+    "author": "pepicrft",
+    "url": "https://x.com/pepicrft/status/2008537899172851978"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Not clawdbot helping unblock people and giving strong technical answers",
+    "author": "iAmHenryMascot",
+    "url": "https://x.com/iAmHenryMascot/status/2008145673858752606"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Others: building finance, jira, obsidian skills. Me: Nepp turn on my tv",
+    "author": "kevinkern",
+    "url": "https://x.com/kevinkern/status/2009040592580288746"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "As much as I sometimes fear the current timeline, things like this make me super happy",
+    "author": "hjanuschka",
+    "url": "https://x.com/hjanuschka/status/2009354612957172048"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Now I am fulfilled as a nerd. My clawdbot is finally alive.",
+    "author": "PopVerseYT",
+    "url": "https://x.com/PopVerseYT/status/2009076788526501993"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "The future of development everyone",
+    "author": "mindragon",
+    "url": "https://x.com/mindragon/status/2006859169979330861"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Absolutely fantastic. So addictive, fun, and actually useful.",
+    "author": "The_Global_Soul",
+    "url": "https://x.com/The_Global_Soul/status/2008185607659659752"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "The world needs to see this",
+    "author": "richardpoelderl",
+    "url": "https://x.com/richardpoelderl/status/2009614946016083975"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Getting bolder every day with @clawdbot",
+    "author": "Cocoanetics",
+    "url": "https://x.com/Cocoanetics/status/2009631815808536716"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Seeing how extraordinarily this works I kinda want to interact everything like this",
+    "author": "marcelpociot",
+    "url": "https://x.com/marcelpociot/status/2009195356735852664"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Clawdbot offered to build its own tooling then set everything up itself",
+    "author": "stevecaldwell",
+    "url": "https://x.com/stevecaldwell/status/2007623085508440418"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Told it to create a process and write docs. Sent it an idea. And it just worked!",
+    "author": "andrewjiang",
+    "url": "https://x.com/andrewjiang/status/2007966370072547398"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Clawdbot is fucking DANK",
+    "author": "kenwheeler",
+    "url": "https://x.com/kenwheeler/status/2008692793888100509"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Clawd is a crazy and really cool tool",
+    "author": "bangkokbuild",
+    "url": "https://x.com/bangkokbuild/status/2007776814094250153"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Now @clawdbot finds my train connections. Dates + preferences in, best routes out.",
+    "author": "crossiBuilds",
+    "url": "https://x.com/crossiBuilds/status/2007441740735643922"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Ok @clawdbot is actually a game-changer for me!",
+    "author": "michalmalewicz",
+    "url": "https://x.com/michalmalewicz/status/2008827357420003579"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "What an amazing time to be alive. Magic is happening!",
+    "author": "tobihagemann",
+    "url": "https://x.com/tobihagemann/status/2008470716274843859"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Is @clawdbot the 2026 Hubot?",
+    "author": "samlambert",
+    "url": "https://x.com/samlambert/status/2008274452971454493"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Away from home, so having @clawdbot check up things for me",
+    "author": "gmickel",
+    "url": "https://x.com/gmickel/status/2008917916079550899"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "This thing has really opened my eyes to how personal tasks can be automated. Already blown away.",
+    "author": "mneves75",
+    "url": "https://x.com/mneves75/status/2007988095627763893"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "They're talking to each other! This is the best project ever",
+    "author": "4shad0wed",
+    "url": "https://x.com/4shad0wed/status/2007882979302130018"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Fixed a bug in clawd with clawd itself in Telegram. Can't wait to play more!",
+    "author": "DanielGri",
+    "url": "https://x.com/DanielGri/status/2008477573810909571"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot as PM with access to code, Linear, WhatsApp history and Obsidian is coming along nicely",
+    "author": "crossiBuilds",
+    "url": "https://x.com/crossiBuilds/status/2008191995915927916"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Connect @clawdbot to Sentry, let it triage issues and self-fix what it can",
+    "author": "therno",
+    "url": "https://x.com/therno/status/2007931261948510454"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "All the cool kids are on clawd.bot right now",
+    "author": "HeyItzaMi",
+    "url": "https://x.com/HeyItzaMi/status/2008933915474719163"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "So unbelievably cool. Had Claude Opus install and configure it all for me.",
+    "author": "doodlestein",
+    "url": "https://x.com/doodlestein/status/2007996215892336924"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "I love @clawdbot - the Telegram integration is awesome",
+    "author": "Cocoanetics",
+    "url": "https://x.com/Cocoanetics/status/2009381242848845879"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Clawdbot is blowing my mind",
+    "author": "dodeja",
+    "url": "https://x.com/dodeja/status/2008379348383146432"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Gave in to the craze, and it's 100% justified. Go set it up!",
+    "author": "prathamdby",
+    "url": "https://x.com/prathamdby/status/2008625464420843558"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Couldn't resist. Set up @clawdbot today. Love how fun this format is.",
+    "author": "chris__sev",
+    "url": "https://x.com/chris__sev/status/2008013237896536310"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Set up @clawdbot which is great. Slowly learning its capabilities.",
+    "author": "holfyio",
+    "url": "https://x.com/holfyio/status/2008808868252708897"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "LOVE that it can edit its own system prompt and skills on the fly then hot-reload them",
+    "author": "hey_zilla",
+    "url": "https://x.com/hey_zilla/status/2007956793255985625"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Mind blowing what it can do. All via my personal Discord server. Tip of the iceberg.",
+    "author": "cupcake_trader",
+    "url": "https://x.com/cupcake_trader/status/2008577043978768433"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Helped me clean up hundreds of emails. Inbox 0. Then setup a weekly cron job. All on WhatsApp.",
+    "author": "andrewjiang",
+    "url": "https://x.com/andrewjiang/status/2006890964582019257"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Setting up on a cloud VPS is so much fun. Closest experience to an AI EA I've had.",
+    "author": "yangpten",
+    "url": "https://x.com/yangpten/status/2008295161550217720"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Trying to resist the urge to scrap all work and spin up my own @clawdbot",
+    "author": "iannuttall",
+    "url": "https://x.com/iannuttall/status/2008193414177947728"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Can I send voice messages? 3 doritos later: OMG I don't even have to type!",
+    "author": "chrisrodz35",
+    "url": "https://x.com/chrisrodz35/status/2008290894584131736"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Gave in to the hype. A powerful AI assistant that can do anything on Mac/server.",
+    "author": "arturneumann",
+    "url": "https://x.com/arturneumann/status/2008785676096205002"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Holy cow @clawdbot is a good fit for PARA",
+    "author": "artpi",
+    "url": "https://x.com/artpi/status/2009671517789913418"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Endless possibilities when you combine a coding agent with browser access and local memory",
+    "author": "NeerajPrad",
+    "url": "https://x.com/NeerajPrad/status/2008735778592223396"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Loving @clawdbot so far",
+    "author": "marchattonhere",
+    "url": "https://x.com/marchattonhere/status/2009562498748563505"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "@clawdbot succeeded finding an email while Poke failed. I prefer my data through infra I own.",
+    "author": "JoshRadDev",
+    "url": "https://x.com/JoshRadDev/status/2008797715040494003"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "This mf called @steipete has achieved AGI with @clawdbot",
+    "author": "rmedranollamas",
+    "url": "https://x.com/rmedranollamas/status/2008649596474716515"
+  }
+]
